name: codex-talkto-agent-cloud
description: Codex plugin for rsync mailbox messaging with remote agents. Codex 通过 rsync mailbox 与远端任意 Agent 互发消息的插件。

interface.shortDescription: Exchange messages with remote agents through a safe rsync mailbox. 通过安全 rsync mailbox 与远端 Agent 互发消息。
interface.longDescription: Provides a configurable file mailbox bridge for local Codex to exchange text messages and attachments with a user-specified remote agent. The remote side can be Codex CLI, Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw, a shell script, or any service that reads and writes the mailbox JSON protocol. Server addresses, agent IDs, mailbox paths, and thread IDs come from local config and environment variables.
defaultPrompt: Send a mailbox message to my cloud agent.
